flavor_text: Full of vigor and always in high spirits. It was once known by the name ”Lantern-Tail” and feared as some kind of apparition.

name: monferno
flavor_text: The deeper the blue on its face, the more powerful it will grow to become. It leaps about every which way and lands powerful blows against its opponents with the flame on its tail.

name: infernape
flavor_text: A tall, hardy Pokémon with a dazzling appearance. It shrouds itself in flame and battles as if engaged in dance—truly a sight to behold.

name: piplup
flavor_text: Prefers cold climes and appears along coasts. It's an adorable little thing—as cute as any child—but it's also prideful, unwilling to accept handouts from people.

name: prinplup
flavor_text: It swims gracefully through the frigid sea and sings with a voice like the roaring tide. It has powerful, sturdy wings and dignity to match.

name: empoleon
flavor_text: Since ancient times, it has been revered by the people of Hisui, who call it the Master of the Waves. Its wings are a match for even master-crafted blades.

name: starly
flavor_text: They live in the fields and mountains, gathering in large flocks. Their cries are quite obnoxious. Though small, their wings are strong—a strike from them leaves pain that persists for a week.

name: staravia
flavor_text: They form remarkably large flocks and are constantly fighting amongst themselves. I suspect that those with magnificent plumes on their heads are the strong ones.

name: staraptor
flavor_text: When Staravia evolve into Staraptor, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings.

staraptor-mega.flavor_text: Mega Staraptor is a top-class flier. It can easily soar through the sky while gripping a Steelix that weighs more than .

name: bidoof
flavor_text: Bidoof has an unsophisticated face and is rarely flustered by anything. There have been incidents involving Bidoof sauntering into villages and gnawing on the houses without a single care.

name: bibarel
flavor_text: Bibarel fur repels water and is also a fantastic material for heat retention. These Pokémon create dams on rivers to live in.

name: kricketot
flavor_text: When the trees take on new hues, more of these Pokémon appear. The tone they create by striking their antennae together resembles that of the marimba, an instrument of foreign lands.

name: kricketune
flavor_text: It uses its cutlass-like arms to produce sound, the melody of which varies from individual to individual. It is a worthwhile endeavor to seek out one's favorite tunes.

name: shinx
flavor_text: Shakes its body to generate electricity. Its stature belies its aggression—one must be patient to tame this Pokémon.

name: luxio
flavor_text: Proudly uses its electrified claws as weapons. It seems to be a gracious Pokémon, evenly sharing the spoils of the hunt with others of its kind.

name: luxray
flavor_text: They form packs, each having one male as leader. Legends say that when Luxray's two eyes shimmer with gold, the Pokémon can see through anything.

name: budew
flavor_text: When the sun's light strengthens, the bud atop this Pokémon's head opens. This is a sign to the people that the harsh winter is over, and the season of budding has begun.

name: roserade
flavor_text: Hidden within the bouquet on each hand are thorned whips loaded with virulent poison. Roserade moves gracefully as it corners its prey and mercilessly lashes them with its whips.

name: cranidos
flavor_text: An incredibly rare sight. They duel each other by ramming their heads together, and the resulting sound echoes throughout the area like the pealing of a bell.

name: rampardos
flavor_text: Very little is known about its biology. Can knock down massive trees by smashing its beautiful, pearl-like crown against them.

name: shieldon
flavor_text: Much remains unknown about this Pokémon, as few have ever seen it. However, we know that it is calm and dislikes conflict, and it enjoys polishing its face against trees and rocks.

name: bastiodon
flavor_text: Its face is sturdy—as strong as diamond—and this hardness offers a very stable defense. Much about this species is still unknown, such as its natural habitat.

name: burmy
flavor_text: If its cloak is even slightly damaged, Burmy will immediately repair it with whatever is close at hand. The Pokémon within the cloak is scrawny and vulnerable to the cold.

name: wormadam-plant
flavor_text: Its appearance changes depending on where it evolved. The materials on hand become a part of its body.

wormadam-sandy.flavor_text: Its earthen skin is reasonably hard—it has no problem repelling a Starly's pecking, at least.

wormadam-trash.flavor_text: Its body, composed of refuse, blends in to the scenery so much as to be inconspicuous. This seems to be the perfect way for the Pokémon to evade the detection of predators.

name: mothim
flavor_text: Scatters steel-colored scales as it flaps its wings. Despite being observed feeding primarily on the nectar of flowers, Mothim is not often seen around flower gardens.

name: combee
flavor_text: They swear fealty to a queen Pokémon and work diligently to gather nectar. Each swarm produces a different flavor of honey.

name: vespiquen
flavor_text: Commands its subjects to build its hive. It will dispatch any interlopers who dare sneak into its nest and use them as nourishment for itself.

name: pachirisu
flavor_text: A species related to the Pikachu line. Though Pachirisu is a calm Pokémon, it still presents a danger should one touch its electrified tail or cheeks.

name: buizel
flavor_text: It moves freely in the water by spinning its forked tail for propulsion. The resemblance to the screw of a steamboat is coincidental.

name: floatzel
flavor_text: Has a long, rather splendid flotation sac, which prevents Floatzel from drowning even in stormy seas. One might glimpse this species around fishing hamlets from time to time.

name: cherubi
flavor_text: Once the fruit growing alongside the main body is large and plump, Cherubi will use the nutrients within to evolve. The fruit then detaches, becoming nourishment for other creatures.

name: cherrim
flavor_text: Motionless, save for the occasional quiver. A rich array of Pokémon can be found gathered around it, drawn by the scent exuded from Cherrim's folded petals.

name: shellos
flavor_text: Found in abundance on seashores bordering warm waters. Shellos are unexpectedly friendly and will crawl toward any person they see. Take care not to get coated in mucus!

name: gastrodon
flavor_text: Eats beach sand for nourishment. Should one Gastrodon encounter another of a different color, a fierce battle will inevitably ensue.

name: ambipom
flavor_text: To affirm their kinship, members of this species will form a ring by linking their newly doubled tails together. On rare occasions, humans have been accepted into such rings.

name: drifloon
flavor_text: Said to lure away young children and carry them off to the afterlife. Some whisper that Drifloon are formed of reincarnated human souls, but these rumors are as yet unconfirmed.

name: drifblim
flavor_text: It drifts along at dusk, perfectly silent. Its transient, melancholy aspect touches some people deeply—every so often, one will come upon a song or poem devoted to Drifblim.

name: buneary
flavor_text: My hypothesis as to why Buneary rolls up its ears is that its hearing is far too keen. I surmise that the Pokémon protects its hearing by limiting the sound that may enter its ears.

name: lopunny
flavor_text: Lopunny is constantly monitoring its surroundings. If dangers approaches, this Pokémon responds with superdestructive kicks.

lopunny-mega.flavor_text: It swings its ears like whips and strikes its enemies with them. It has an intensely combative disposition.

name: mismagius
flavor_text: The incantations Mismagius chants can ward against misfortune, so a custom exists of inviting it into one's home. Incur the Pokémon's displeasure, however, and disaster will surely ensue.

name: honchkrow
flavor_text: One cry from this Pokémon, and a murder of Murkrow come flying. At such times, one would think the curtain of night had fallen, plunging the world into jet-black darkness.

name: glameow
flavor_text: Bewitches humans with its helical tail and piercing gaze. Its hidden claws are quite sharp as well, making this Pokémon an exceedingly tricky opponent if antagonized.

name: purugly
flavor_text: Though impudent and difficult to tame, Purugly enjoys great popularity due to its fur, the beauty of which surpasses even velveteen.

name: chingling
flavor_text: This Pokémon gave me an excruciating headache when it seemingly cried out without making a sound. Perhaps there are some sounds that the human ear is simply incapable of hearing.

name: stunky
flavor_text: The poison that gushes from its aft end is accompanied by an utterly evil-smelling odor with such potency that one whiff can induce memory loss.

name: skuntank
flavor_text: Sprays a poisonous fluid to take down prey. Sometimes, unable to stomach the stench of its own fluid, it leaves the bested prey uneaten.

name: bronzor
flavor_text: Floats using a mysterious energy. The pattern engraved upon its back is held as sacred and can sometimes be found in imagery from ancient cemeteries and other such timeworn places.

name: bronzong
flavor_text: Some believe that its bell-like cry opens holes to another world. It has been revered as a deity since ancient times.

name: bonsly
flavor_text: Its tears elicit sympathy from those who see them, but do not be deceived! This expulsion of body water is merely a physiological mechanism for keeping itself in good health.

name: mime-jr
flavor_text: Known to turn up in bustling marketplaces now and again. It mimics people much as a child would, then watches how they react, eyes sparkling.

name: happiny
flavor_text: In imitation of Chansey, it keeps a round stone tucked into its belly pouch and cherishes it dearly. It gets along well with children and will sometimes play house with them for fun.

name: chatot
flavor_text: A versatile performer skilled in the imitation of human speech. It is said that older, more experienced Chatot can even understand the meaning of the words they mimic.

name: spiritomb
flavor_text: It lays curses by thinking wicked thoughts. Writings tell that this Pokémon was born out of the assembly of five score and eight malevolent spirits.

name: gible
flavor_text: It nests in caves untouched by sunlight. Its sharp teeth may fall out when worn away or after an impact, but they regrow within a few days.

name: gabite
flavor_text: Though Gabite are usually of a violent disposition, when I gave one a glass bead it had been eyeing covetously, it suddenly became quite docile.

name: garchomp
flavor_text: It is said that when one runs at high speed, its wings create blades of wind that can fell nearby trees.

garchomp-mega.flavor_text: Its disposition is more vicious than before its Mega Evolution. Garchomp carves its opponents up with the scythes on both arms.

garchomp-mega-z.flavor_text: Garchomp has gained a new Mega-Evolved form. It flies around foes at Mach speed and cuts them to shreds with its sinister wing claws.

name: munchlax
flavor_text: Its robust stomach allows it to nonchalantly devour even rotted matter. It pays frequent visits to villages, seeking out food scraps intended for compost.

name: riolu
flavor_text: Though infantile in appearance, it has the mysterious ability to read the minds of humans. The pure of heart are met with Riolu's approval, while those of ill nature earn only its loathing.

name: lucario
flavor_text: It’s said that no foe can remain invisible to Lucario, since it can detect auras—even those of foes it could not otherwise see.

lucario-mega.flavor_text: Black streaks all over its body show where its auras and the energy of Mega Evolution intermingled and raced through it.

lucario-mega-z.flavor_text: By completely cloaking itself in its aura, Mega Lucario Z can parry all manner of attacks, battling as if it were gracefully dancing.

name: hippopotas
flavor_text: Though large and languid, Hippopotas is difficult to detect due to its tendency to burrow into and lurk beneath the soil. When agitated or excited, it expels sand from its nostrils.

name: hippowdon
flavor_text: Short-tempered and easily moved to violence. It whips up whirlwinds of sand to crush its foes' spirits, then goes in for the attack.

name: skorupi
flavor_text: Its claws are not only razor-sharp but poisonous, making Skorupi a highly dangerous Pokémon. It seems to be weakened by cold temperatures, however.

name: drapion
flavor_text: Has a brutish, ferocious temperament. With immense strength and a sturdy shell off which swords will bounce, it rampages about and wreaks havoc.

name: croagunk
flavor_text: A poison wielder with a dastardly personality. Despite such qualities, this species is afforded a measure of popularity due to its peculiar cry and comical features.

name: toxicroak
flavor_text: Its crimson claws contain a virulent toxin. This toxin can be made into a tonic by diluting it, mixing it with several types of wild grass, and boiling it down over two days.

name: carnivine
flavor_text: Though this is a plant Pokémon, it has a gluttonous and unruly temperament. Carnivine attacks its prey with its cavernous maw wide open.

name: finneon
flavor_text: What a gorgeous sight this Pokémon is as it swims with its long, pink-painted caudal fins fluttering behind it. Finneon's beautiful appearance has led to its nickname: ”finery fish.”

name: lumineon
flavor_text: Uses its gleaming fins to hunt its prey. The view of Lumineon schooling near the surface of the sea at night is breathtaking— it's as though there were shining stars right there.

name: mantyke
flavor_text: Though ball-like in shape, this Pokémon is a proficient swimmer. I have discovered that if a Mantyke spends much time with schools of Remoraid, it will eventually achieve evolution.

name: snover
flavor_text: One is likely to encounter this Pokémon while out in the snow. There are stories of Snover appearing in human settlements but doing no harm—rather, they bond with the children.

name: abomasnow
flavor_text: It lives a quiet life on mountains that are perpetually covered in snow. It hides itself by whipping up blizzards.

abomasnow-mega.flavor_text: The buds on its back have sprouted into impressive icicles that can whip up massive blizzards of −22 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: weavile
flavor_text: This species corners prey as a pack, under the guidance of a leader. Weavile displays increased cunning, leading me to speculate that its evolution caused further brain development.

name: magnezone
flavor_text: I theorize that a special magnetic field influenced this Pokémon, changing its molecular structure and causing it to evolve. It emits strange radio waves toward space from its antenna.

name: lickilicky
flavor_text: Its tongue can extend and contract freely, and it is capable of reaching lengths over 10 times Lickilicky's height. Beware of the saliva, as it contains corrosive elements.

name: rhyperior
flavor_text: This Pokémon evolved through use of a curious item. Its rocklike hide is composed of a mysterious substance and can withstand a blow from a masterwork sword with nary a scratch.

name: tangrowth
flavor_text: Draped with long vines, it resembles a shrub in appearance. It swings bundles of vines as though they were arms, wrapping them around prey to ensnare them.

name: electivire
flavor_text: Its evolution was induced by an unusual item, and its electrical output rises along with its heart rate. From its tails, it can unleash an electric current measuring 20,000 volts.

name: magmortar
flavor_text: Use of a strange item caused this Pokémon to evolve. Fireballs launched from the ends of its tubelike arms are hot enough to melt an iron pot in an instant.

name: togekiss
flavor_text: Scant few have ever sighted this Pokémon. After studying what literature remains, I am certain Togekiss will reveal itself when peace reigns in the land.

name: yanmega
flavor_text: Extremely violent. When hunting, it wastes none of its energy, aiming only for prey's most vulnerable spots. Any who manage to tame this Pokémon must be of incredible bravery.

name: leafeon
flavor_text: Cells similar to those of plants have been found in its fur. Its hard tail can fell a large tree with one stroke, and the tail's sharpness exceeds even that of a sword crafted by a master.

name: glaceon
flavor_text: Glaceon is able to lower its body temperature very quickly. It freezes the atmosphere, creating diamond dust that glitters like gems while it flutters and dances around.

name: gliscor
flavor_text: It glides soundlessly on pitch-black wings and sinks sharp fangs into the throat of its prey. It takes on a look of satisfaction once it has entirely drained its prey of blood.

name: mamoswine
flavor_text: This species reached its zenith during the period known as the ice age. I suspect that Hisui's frigid climate is in harmony with Mamoswine's constitution, thus awakening hidden potential.

name: porygon-z
flavor_text: A curious item induced this evolution. The Pokémon's offensive capabilities have greatly increased, but the strangeness of its behavior has magnified in equal measure. This worries me.

name: gallade
flavor_text: When trying to protect someone, it extends its elbows as if they were swords and fights savagely.

gallade-mega.flavor_text: It gets power from the bond it has with its Trainer. Mega Evolution has given it plates to slice its enemies and a cape to protect its body.

name: probopass
flavor_text: It is able to emit powerful magnetism, allowing it control over the iron sand that forms its luscious mustache. Using this iron sand, Probopass forms hard stones with which it smites its prey.

name: dusknoir
flavor_text: Comes to those whose lives have come to an end and escorts their souls to the afterlife. Known to mistakenly take the souls of those who yet have life left in them, albeit rarely.

name: froslass
flavor_text: When it finds humans or Pokémon it likes, it freezes them and takes them to its chilly den, where they become decorations.

froslass-mega.flavor_text: This Pokémon can use eerie cold air imbued with ghost energy to freeze even insubstantial things, such as flames or the wind.

name: rotom
flavor_text: Its electricity-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief.

rotom-heat.flavor_text: If the convection microwave oven is not working properly, then the Rotom inhabiting it will become lethargic.

rotom-wash.flavor_text: This Rotom has entered a washing machine. It nods with satisfaction after it floods the surrounding area.

rotom-frost.flavor_text: This Rotom has entered a refrigerator. It leaps around gleefully after it uses cold air to freeze the area around it.

rotom-fan.flavor_text: This Rotom has entered an electric fan. It smirks with satisfaction over a prank well pulled after it blows away everything around it.

rotom-mow.flavor_text: The lawn mower is one of the household appliances that led to the development of the Rotom Dex.

name: uxie
flavor_text: A Pokémon feared but also respected for stealing away the memories of evildoers. I have found records that suggest Uxie holds dominion over knowledge.

name: mesprit
flavor_text: Known as the Being of Emotion. In legend, this Pokémon was feared, as any who showed disrespect would have their emotions thrown into disarray.

name: azelf
flavor_text: The dreaded Being of Willpower. Legends tell of this Pokémon manipulating the will of its adversaries and turning them into puppets of its own.

name: dialga
flavor_text: This Pokémon is revered as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Dialga was what caused the vast river of time to begin flowing in our world.

dialga-origin.flavor_text: Radiant light caused Dialga to take on a form bearing a striking resemblance to Arceus. Dialga now wields such colossal strength that one must conclude this is its true form.

name: palkia
flavor_text: This Pokémon is feared as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Palkia was what caused the walls of our world to disappear, creating a sky that spans for infinity.

palkia-origin.flavor_text: It soars across the sky in a form that greatly resembles the creator of all things. Perhaps this imitation of appearance is Palkia's strategy for gaining Arceus's powers.

name: heatran
flavor_text: Boiling, magma-like blood circulates through its body. It makes its dwelling place in volcanic caves.

heatran-mega.flavor_text: It's said that if it goes all out, it can heat its body up to temperatures over 1.8 million degrees Fahrenheit. This heat keeps enemies at bay.

name: regigigas
flavor_text: According to legend, Regigigas pulled landmasses together and bound them with rope to create the continent of Hisui. Though I have my doubts, the story could well contain a shred of truth.

name: giratina-altered
flavor_text: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.

giratina-origin.flavor_text: Giratina loses its legs upon changing into this form. I believe this Pokémon must hail from a world where the heavens and the earth are as one, though I have no way of proving it.

name: cresselia
flavor_text: Cresselia is reminiscent of the crescent moon. It leaves a brilliant line of light in its wake as it flies across the night sky. I daresay it resembles the heavenly maiden who created the Milky Way.

name: phione
flavor_text: Can be seen floating offshore during seasons when the seas are warm. Its azure body blends in with the ocean waters—logic suggests this is a defense mechanism against natural predators.

name: manaphy
flavor_text: Rumored to migrate across the oceans and visit Hisui's coastal waters only rarely. Although Manaphy resembles Phione, it is also quite different. The relation between the two is unclear.

name: darkrai
flavor_text: It can lull people into a deep sleep and make them dream. It is active on nights with a new moon.

darkrai-mega.flavor_text: Its dark power blocks out the sun, plunging the surrounding area into darkness. There is no escaping its evil eye.

name: shaymin-land
flavor_text: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

shaymin-sky.flavor_text: Upon taking in the scent of a particular rare flower, Shaymin is enveloped in light, and its tiny body transforms. I took a whiff of the flower myself, but alas, my body remained unchanged.

name: arceus
flavor_text: It is the heavenly fount from which pours the light that shines across Hisui. Its luminance guides and protects all Pokémon. Hisuian mythology states that Arceus is the creator of all things.

name: victini
flavor_text: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being’s entire body will be overflowing with power.

name: snivy
flavor_text: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.

name: servine
flavor_text: When it gets dirty, its leaves can’t be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.

name: serperior
flavor_text: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.

name: tepig
flavor_text: It loves to eat roasted berries, but sometimes it gets too excited and burns them to a crisp.

name: pignite
flavor_text: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

name: emboar
flavor_text: The flames blazing deep inside Emboar’s chest erupt vigorously from its chin, forming a beard of fire.

emboar-mega.flavor_text: Brandishing a blazing flame shaped like a serpentine spear, it rushes in to rescue its imperiled allies.

name: oshawott
flavor_text: This Pokémon from the Unova region uses the shell on its belly as a weapon to cut down its foes. Thus, I've conferred upon this shell the name ”scalchop”.

name: dewott
flavor_text: Its exquisite double-scalchop technique is likely the result of daily training, and it can send even masters of the blade fleeing in defeat.

name: samurott
flavor_text: A master of a sword-drawing art called iaijutsu, Samurott settles its battles with a single swing of either large sword sheathed in its foreleg armor.

samurott-hisui.flavor_text: Hard of heart and deft of blade, this rare form of Samurott is a product of the Pokémon's evolution in the region of Hisui. Its turbulent blows crash into foes like ceaseless pounding waves.

name: patrat
flavor_text: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won’t notice a foe coming from behind.

name: watchog
flavor_text: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

name: lillipup
flavor_text: This Pokémon is far brighter than the average child, and Lillipup won’t forget the love it receives or any abuse it suffers.

name: herdier
flavor_text: The black fur that covers this Pokémon’s body is dense and springy. Even sharp fangs bounce right off.

name: stoutland
flavor_text: Stoutland is immensely proud of its impressive moustache. It’s said that moustache length is what determines social standing among this species.

name: purrloin
flavor_text: Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable behavior come away with stinging scratches from its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.

name: liepard
flavor_text: This stealthy Pokémon sneaks up behind prey without making any sound at all. It competes with Thievul for territory.

name: pansage
flavor_text: It’s good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It’s kind enough to share them with friends.

name: simisage
flavor_text: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

name: pansear
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: simisear
flavor_text: When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.

name: panpour
flavor_text: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

name: simipour
flavor_text: It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.

name: munna
flavor_text: It eats dreams and releases mist. The mist is pink when it’s eating a good dream, and black when it’s eating a nightmare.

name: musharna
flavor_text: It drowses and dreams all the time. It’s best to leave it be if it’s just woken up, as it’s a terrible grump when freshly roused from sleep.

name: pidove
flavor_text: It’s forgetful and not very bright, but many Trainers love it anyway for its friendliness and sincerity.

name: tranquill
flavor_text: These bright Pokémon have acute memories. Apparently delivery workers often choose them as their partners.

name: unfezant
flavor_text: This Pokémon is intelligent and intensely proud. People will sit up and take notice if you become the Trainer of one.

name: blitzle
flavor_text: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use the frequency and rhythm of these flashes to communicate.

name: zebstrika
flavor_text: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

name: roggenrola
flavor_text: When it detects a noise, it starts to move. The energy core inside it makes this Pokémon slightly warm to the touch.

name: boldore
flavor_text: It relies on sound in order to monitor what’s in its vicinity. When angered, it will attack without ever changing the direction it’s facing.

name: gigalith
flavor_text: Although its energy blasts can blow away a dump truck, they have a limitation— they can only be fired when the sun is out.

name: woobat
flavor_text: It emits ultrasonic waves as it flutters about, searching for its prey—bug Pokémon.

name: swoobat
flavor_text: The auspicious shape of this Pokémon’s nose apparently led some regions to consider Swoobat a symbol of good luck.

name: drilbur
flavor_text: It’s a digger, using its claws to burrow through the ground. It causes damage to vegetable crops, so many farmers have little love for it.

name: excadrill
flavor_text: Forming a drill with its steel claws and head, it can bore through a steel plate, no matter how thick it is.

excadrill-mega.flavor_text: If this Pokémon brings its arms and head together to form a streamlined shape and spins at high speeds, it can destroy anything.

name: audino
flavor_text: Audino's sense of hearing is superb. Not even a pebble rolling along over a mile away will escape Audino's ears.

audino-mega.flavor_text: Anyone who touches the secondary feelers that have sprouted from the base of its throat will fall into a deep sleep.

name: timburr
flavor_text: Timburr that have started carrying logs that are about three times their size are nearly ready to evolve.

name: gurdurr
flavor_text: Gurdurr excels at demolition—construction is not its forte. In any case, there’s skill in the way this Pokémon wields its metal beam.

name: conkeldurr
flavor_text: When going all out, this Pokémon throws aside its concrete pillars and leaps at opponents to pummel them with its fists.

name: tympole
flavor_text: It uses sound waves to communicate with others of its kind. People and other Pokémon species can’t hear its cries of warning.

name: palpitoad
flavor_text: On occasion, their cries are sublimely pleasing to the ear. Palpitoad with larger lumps on their bodies can sing with a wider range of sounds.

name: seismitoad
flavor_text: This Pokémon is popular among the elderly, who say the vibrations of its lumps are great for massages.

name: throh
flavor_text: They train in groups of five. Any member that can’t keep up will discard its belt and leave the group.

name: sawk
flavor_text: The karate chops of a Sawk that’s trained itself to the limit can cleave the ocean itself.

name: sewaddle
flavor_text: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.

name: swadloon
flavor_text: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.

name: leavanny
flavor_text: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.

name: venipede
flavor_text: Its fangs are highly venomous. If this Pokémon finds prey it thinks it can eat, it leaps for them without any thought of how things might turn out.

name: whirlipede
flavor_text: Whirlipede protects itself with a sturdy shell and poisonous spikes while it stores up the energy it’ll need for evolution.

name: scolipede
flavor_text: Scolipede latches on to its prey with the claws on its neck before slamming them into the ground and jabbing them with its claw's toxic spikes.

scolipede-mega.flavor_text: Its deadly venom gives off a faint glow. The venom affects Scolipede's mind, honing its viciousness.

name: cottonee
flavor_text: Weaving together the cotton of both Cottonee and Eldegoss produces exquisite cloth that’s highly prized by many luxury brands.

name: whimsicott
flavor_text: As long as this Pokémon bathes in sunlight, its cotton keeps growing. If too much cotton fluff builds up, Whimsicott tears it off and scatters it.

name: petilil
flavor_text: The leaves on its head are highly valued for medicinal purposes. Dry the leaves in the sun, boil them, and then drink the bitter decoction for remarkably effective relief from fatigue.

name: lilligant
flavor_text: The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect, but taking care of it is very difficult.

lilligant-hisui.flavor_text: I suspect that its well-developed legs are the result of a life spent on mountains covered in deep snow. The scent it exudes from its flower crown heartens those in proximity.

name: basculin-red-striped
flavor_text: Red and blue Basculin usually do not get along, but sometimes members of one school mingle with the other's school.

basculin-blue-striped.flavor_text: These Pokémon form schools with others of the same color. The greatest foe of a school of blue Basculin is a school of red Basculin.

basculin-white-striped.flavor_text: They live in frigid seas, forming schools and sharing food among themselves. When the time comes, they return to the river they were born in.

name: sandile
flavor_text: Sandile is small, but its legs and lower body are powerful. Pushing sand aside as it goes, Sandile moves through the desert as if it’s swimming.

name: krokorok
flavor_text: Although this Pokémon has specialized eyes that allow it to see in the dark, Krokorok won’t move much at night—the desert gets cold after sunset.

name: krookodile
flavor_text: While terribly aggressive, Krookodile also has the patience to stay hidden under sand for days, lying in wait for prey.

name: darumaka
flavor_text: It derives its power from fire burning inside its body. If the fire dwindles, this Pokémon will immediately fall asleep.

darumaka-galar.flavor_text: It lived in snowy areas for so long that its fire sac cooled off and atrophied. It now has an organ that generates cold instead.

name: darmanitan-standard
flavor_text: Its internal fire burns at , making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.

darmanitan-galar-standard.flavor_text: On days when blizzards blow through, it comes down to where people live. It stashes food in the snowball on its head, taking it home for later.

darmanitan-galar-zen.flavor_text: Anger has reignited its atrophied flame sac. This Pokémon spews fire everywhere as it rampages indiscriminately.

darmanitan-zen.flavor_text: Through meditation, it calms its raging spirit and hones its psychic powers.

name: maractus
flavor_text: Once each year, this Pokémon scatters its seeds. They’re jam-packed with nutrients, making them a precious food source out in the desert.

name: dwebble
flavor_text: It first tries to find a rock to live in, but if there are no suitable rocks to be found, Dwebble may move in to the ports of a Hippowdon.

name: crustle
flavor_text: Its thick claws are its greatest weapons. They’re mighty enough to crack Rhyperior’s carapace.

name: scraggy
flavor_text: It protects itself with its durable skin. It’s thought that this Pokémon will evolve once its skin has completely stretched out.

name: scrafty
flavor_text: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.

scrafty-mega.flavor_text: Mega Evolution has caused Scrafty's shed skin to turn white, growing tough and supple. Of course, this Pokémon is still as feisty as ever.

name: sigilyph
flavor_text: A discovery was made in the desert where Sigilyph fly. The ruins of what may have been an ancient city were found beneath the sands.

name: yamask
flavor_text: It wanders through ruins by night, carrying a mask that's said to have been the face it had when it was still human.

yamask-galar.flavor_text: A clay slab with cursed engravings took possession of a Yamask. The slab is said to be absorbing the Yamask's dark power.

name: cofagrigus
flavor_text: There are many depictions of Cofagrigus decorating ancient tombs. They’re symbols of the wealth that kings of bygone eras had.

name: tirtouga
flavor_text: Tirtouga is considered to be the ancestor of many turtle Pokémon. It was restored to life from a fossil.

name: carracosta
flavor_text: This Pokémon emerges from the water in search of prey despite the fact that it moves more slowly on land.

name: archen
flavor_text: Archen is said to be the ancestor of bird Pokémon. It lived in treetops, eating berries and bug Pokémon.

name: archeops
flavor_text: Though capable of flight, Archeops was apparently better at hunting on the ground.

name: trubbish
flavor_text: This Pokémon was born from a bag stuffed with trash. Galarian Weezing relish the fumes belched by Trubbish.

name: garbodor
flavor_text: This Pokémon eats trash, which turns into poison inside its body. The main component of the poison depends on what sort of trash was eaten.

garbodor-gmax.flavor_text: Due to Gigantamax energy, this Pokémon's toxic gas has become much thicker, congealing into masses shaped like discarded toys.

name: zorua
flavor_text: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

zorua-hisui.flavor_text: A once-departed soul, returned to life in Hisui. Derives power from resentment, which rises as energy atop its head and takes on the forms of foes. In this way, Zorua vents lingering malice.

name: zoroark
flavor_text: Stories say those who tried to catch Zoroark were trapped in an illusion and punished.

zoroark-hisui.flavor_text: With its disheveled white fur, it looks like an embodiment of death. Heedless of its own safety, Zoroark attacks its nemeses with a bitter energy so intense, it lacerates Zoroark's own body.

name: minccino
flavor_text: They pet each other with their tails as a form of greeting. Of the two, the one whose tail is fluffier is a bit more boastful.

name: cinccino
flavor_text: A special oil that seeps through their fur helps them avoid attacks. The oil fetches a high price at market.

name: gothita
flavor_text: Even when nobody seems to be around, Gothita can still be heard making a muted cry. Many believe it’s speaking to something only it can see.

name: gothorita
flavor_text: On nights when the stars shine, this Pokémon’s psychic power is at its strongest. It’s unknown just what link Gothorita has to the greater universe.

name: gothitelle
flavor_text: A criminal who was shown his fate by a Gothitelle went missing that same day and was never seen again.

name: solosis
flavor_text: Many say that the special liquid covering this Pokémon’s body would allow it to survive in the vacuum of space.

name: duosion
flavor_text: Its brain has split into two, and the two halves rarely think alike. Its actions are utterly unpredictable.

name: reuniclus
flavor_text: It’s said that drinking the liquid surrounding Reuniclus grants wisdom. Problem is, the liquid is highly toxic to anything besides Reuniclus itself.

name: ducklett
flavor_text: They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.

name: swanna
flavor_text: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

name: vanillite
flavor_text: Supposedly, this Pokémon was born from an icicle. It spews out freezing air at −58 degrees Fahrenheit to make itself more comfortable.

name: vanillish
flavor_text: It blasts enemies with cold air reaching −148 degrees Fahrenheit, freezing them solid. But it spares their lives afterward—it’s a kind Pokémon.

name: vanilluxe
flavor_text: People believe this Pokémon formed when two Vanillish stuck together. Its body temperature is roughly 21 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: deerling
flavor_text: The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon’s fur. People use it to mark the seasons.

name: sawsbuck
flavor_text: They migrate according to the seasons, so some people call Sawsbuck the harbingers of spring.

name: emolga
flavor_text: This Pokémon absolutely loves sweet berries. Sometimes it stuffs its cheeks full of so much food that it can’t fly properly.

name: karrablast
flavor_text: It spits a liquid from its mouth to melt through Shelmet’s shell. Karrablast doesn’t eat the shell— it eats only the contents.

name: escavalier
flavor_text: It charges its enemies, lances at the ready. An image of one of its duels is captured in a famous painting of Escavalier clashing with Sirfetch’d.

name: foongus
flavor_text: The spores released from this Pokémon’s hands are highly poisonous, but when thoroughly dried, the spores can be used as stomach medicine.

name: amoonguss
flavor_text: Amoonguss generally doesn’t move much. It tends to stand still near Poké Balls that have been dropped on the ground.

name: frillish-male
flavor_text: Legend has it that the residents of a sunken ancient city changed into these Pokémon.

name: jellicent-male
flavor_text: Whenever a full moon hangs in the night sky, schools of Jellicent gather near the surface of the sea, waiting for their prey to appear.

name: alomomola
flavor_text: The reason it helps Pokémon in a weakened condition is that any Pokémon coming after them may also attack Alomomola.

name: joltik
flavor_text: Joltik latch on to other Pokémon and suck out static electricity. They’re often found sticking to Yamper’s hindquarters.

name: galvantula
flavor_text: It lays traps of electrified threads near the nests of bird Pokémon, aiming to snare chicks that are not yet good at flying.

name: ferroseed
flavor_text: Mossy caves are their preferred dwellings. Enzymes contained in mosses help Ferroseed’s spikes grow big and strong.

name: ferrothorn
flavor_text: Its spikes are harder than steel. This Pokémon crawls across rock walls by stabbing the spikes on its feelers into the stone.

name: klink
flavor_text: It’s suspected that Klink were the inspiration behind ancient people’s invention of the first gears.

name: klang
flavor_text: Many companies in the Galar region choose Klang as their logo. This Pokémon is considered the symbol of industrial technology.

name: klinklang
flavor_text: The three gears that compose this Pokémon spin at high speed. Its new spiked gear isn’t a living creature.

name: tynamo
flavor_text: One alone can emit only a trickle of electricity, so a group of them gathers to unleash a powerful electric shock.

name: eelektrik
flavor_text: These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.

name: eelektross
flavor_text: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

eelektross-mega.flavor_text: It now generates 10 times the electricity it did before Mega Evolving. It discharges this electricity from its false Eelektrik, which are made of mucus.

name: elgyem
flavor_text: This Pokémon was discovered about 50 years ago. Its highly developed brain enables it to exert its psychic powers.

name: beheeyem
flavor_text: Sometimes found drifting above wheat fields, this Pokémon can control the memories of its opponents.

name: litwick
flavor_text: The younger the life this Pokémon absorbs, the brighter and eerier the flame on its head burns.

name: lampent
flavor_text: It lurks in cities, pretending to be a lamp. Once it finds someone whose death is near, it will trail quietly after them.

name: chandelure
flavor_text: The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.

chandelure-mega.flavor_text: One of its eyes is a window linking our world with the afterlife. This Pokémon draws in hatred and converts it into power.

name: axew
flavor_text: They play with each other by knocking their large tusks together. Their tusks break sometimes, but they grow back so quickly that it isn’t a concern.

name: fraxure
flavor_text: Its skin is as hard as a suit of armor. Fraxure’s favorite strategy is to tackle its opponents, stabbing them with its tusks at the same time.

name: haxorus
flavor_text: While usually kindhearted, it can be terrifying if angered. Tusks that can slice through steel beams are how Haxorus deals with its adversaries.

name: cubchoo
flavor_text: It sniffles before performing a move, using its frosty snot to provide an icy element to any move that needs it.

name: beartic
flavor_text: It swims energetically through frigid seas. When it gets tired, it freezes the seawater with its breath so it can rest on the ice.

name: cryogonal
flavor_text: When the weather gets hot, these Pokémon turn into water vapor. Cryogonal are almost never seen during summer.

name: shelmet
flavor_text: It has a strange physiology that responds to electricity. When together with Karrablast, Shelmet evolves for some reason.

name: accelgor
flavor_text: Discarding its shell made it nimble. To keep itself from dehydrating, it wraps its body in bands of membrane.

name: stunfisk
flavor_text: Thanks to bacteria that lived in the mud flats with it, this Pokémon developed the organs it uses to generate electricity.

stunfisk-galar.flavor_text: Living in mud with a high iron content has given it a strong steel body.

name: mienfoo
flavor_text: Though small, Mienfoo’s temperament is fierce. Any creature that approaches Mienfoo carelessly will be greeted with a flurry of graceful attacks.

name: mienshao
flavor_text: Delivered at blinding speeds, kicks from this Pokémon can shatter massive boulders into tiny pieces.

name: druddigon
flavor_text: Druddigon are vicious and cunning. They take up residence in nests dug out by other Pokémon, treating the stolen nests as their own lairs.

name: golett
flavor_text: This Pokémon was created from clay. It received orders from its master many thousands of years ago, and it still follows those orders to this day.

name: golurk
flavor_text: When the seal on its chest is removed, it rages indiscriminately. During such rampages, it can turn a whole town into a mountain of rubble.

golurk-mega.flavor_text: The energy within Golurk has been stimulated by Mega Evolution. The Pokémon could explode at any moment.

name: pawniard
flavor_text: A pack of these Pokémon forms to serve a Bisharp boss. Each Pawniard trains diligently, dreaming of one day taking the lead.

name: bisharp
flavor_text: Violent conflicts erupt between Bisharp and Fraxure over places where sharpening stones can be found.

name: bouffalant
flavor_text: These Pokémon live in herds of about 20 individuals. Bouffalant that betray the herd will lose the hair on their heads for some reason.

name: rufflet
flavor_text: Its chick-like looks belie its hotheadedness. It challenges its parents at every opportunity, desperate to prove its strength.

name: braviary
flavor_text: The more scars they have, the more respect these brave soldiers of the sky get from their peers.

braviary-hisui.flavor_text: Screaming a bloodcurdling battle cry, this huge and ferocious bird Pokémon goes out on the hunt. It blasts lakes with shock waves, then scoops up any prey that float to the water's surface.

name: vullaby
flavor_text: Vullaby grow quickly. Bones that have gotten too small for older Vullaby to wear often get passed down to younger ones in the nest.

name: mandibuzz
flavor_text: They adorn themselves with bones. There seem to be fashion trends among them, as different bones come into and fall out of popularity.

name: heatmor
flavor_text: A flame serves as its tongue, melting through the hard shell of Durant so that Heatmor can devour their insides.

name: durant
flavor_text: With their large mandibles, these Pokémon can crunch their way through rock. They work together to protect their eggs from Sandaconda.

name: deino
flavor_text: Because it can’t see, this Pokémon is constantly biting at everything it touches, trying to keep track of its surroundings.

name: zweilous
flavor_text: Their two heads will fight each other over a single piece of food. Zweilous are covered in scars even without battling others.

name: hydreigon
flavor_text: The three heads take turns sinking their teeth into the opponent. Their attacks won’t slow until their target goes down.

name: larvesta
flavor_text: Larvesta’s body is warm all over. It spouts fire from the tips of its horns to intimidate predators and scare prey.

name: volcarona
flavor_text: This Pokémon emerges from a cocoon formed of raging flames. Ancient murals depict Volcarona as a deity of fire.

name: cobalion
flavor_text: From the moment it’s born, this Pokémon radiates the air of a leader. Its presence will calm even vicious foes.

name: terrakion
flavor_text: In Unovan legend, Terrakion battled against humans in an effort to protect other Pokémon.

name: virizion
flavor_text: It darts around opponents with a flurry of quick movements, slicing them up with its horns.

name: tornadus-incarnate
flavor_text: Tornadus expels massive energy from its tail, causing severe storms. Its power is great enough to blow houses away.

tornadus-therian.flavor_text: An example of what is known as a “form change,” though I suspect this strange avian guise to be Tornadus's true form. Tornadus has been sighted crossing the ocean while in this form.

name: thundurus-incarnate
flavor_text: As it flies around, it shoots lightning all over the place and causes forest fires. It is therefore disliked.

thundurus-therian.flavor_text: Quick as a flash, it materializes out of nowhere. It pulverizes foes into nothingness with showers of devastatingly powerful lightning bolts launched from the string of orbs on its tail.

name: reshiram
flavor_text: According to myth, if people ignore truth and let themselves become consumed by greed, Reshiram will arrive to burn their kingdoms down.

name: zekrom
flavor_text: Mythology tells us that if people lose the righteousness in their hearts, their kingdoms will be razed by Zekrom’s lightning.

name: landorus-incarnate
flavor_text: From the forces of lightning and wind, it creates energy to give nutrients to the soil and make the land abundant.

landorus-therian.flavor_text: Landorus soars through the sky in this form, bestowing plentiful harvests upon the land and earning the people's reverence. It can traverse the whole of Hisui in a mere couple of hours.

name: kyurem
flavor_text: Dwelling within it is a power even greater than that of Reshiram or Zekrom, but the extreme cold keeps that power bound.

kyurem-black.flavor_text: It's said that this Pokémon battles in order to protect the ideal world that will exist in the future for people and Pokémon.

kyurem-white.flavor_text: The sameness of Reshiram's and Kyurem's genes allowed Kyurem to absorb Reshiram. Kyurem can now use the power of both fire and ice.

name: keldeo-ordinary
flavor_text: When it is resolute, its body fills with power and it becomes swifter. Its jumps are then too fast to follow.

keldeo-resolute.flavor_text: Keldeo has strengthened its resolve for battle, filling its body with power and changing its form.

name: meloetta-aria
flavor_text: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

meloetta-pirouette.flavor_text: Now that it has reclaimed a long-forgotten song, Meloetta captivates everyone with its enchanting dance steps.

name: genesect
flavor_text: This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.

name: chespin
flavor_text: Such a thick shell of wood covers its head and back that even a direct hit from a truck wouldn’t faze it.

name: quilladin
flavor_text: They strengthen their lower bodies by running into one another. They are very kind and won’t start fights.

name: chesnaught
flavor_text: When its allies are in trouble, Chesnaught creates a shield with its arms and uses its own body to block attacks.

chesnaught-mega.flavor_text: It has fortified armor and a will to defend at all costs. Both are absurdly strong.

name: fennekin
flavor_text: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

name: braixen
flavor_text: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.

name: delphox
flavor_text: It leaves burn marks in the ground with the flame at the tip of its wand. Long ago, people used the shapes of these burn marks for divination.

delphox-mega.flavor_text: It wields flaming branches to dazzle its opponents before incinerating them with a huge fireball.

name: froakie
flavor_text: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

name: frogadier
flavor_text: Its swiftness is unparalleled. It can scale a tower of more than 2,000 feet in a minute’s time.

name: greninja
flavor_text: The movement of air against the long tongue Greninja keeps wrapped around its neck allows it to sense enemies it can’t see.

greninja-mega.flavor_text: This Pokémon spins a giant shuriken at high speed to make it float, then clings to it upside down to catch opponents unawares.

name: bunnelby
flavor_text: It’s very sensitive to danger. The sound of Corviknight’s flapping will have Bunnelby digging a hole to hide underground in moments.

name: diggersby
flavor_text: The fur on its belly retains heat exceptionally well. People used to make heavy winter clothing from fur shed by this Pokémon.

name: fletchling
flavor_text: When this Pokémon gets excited, its body temperature increases sharply. If you touch a Fletchling with bare hands, you might get burned.

name: fletchinder
flavor_text: Fletchinder are exceedingly territorial and aggressive. These Pokémon fight among themselves over feeding grounds.

name: talonflame
flavor_text: Talonflame dives toward prey at speeds of up to 310 mph and assaults them with powerful kicks, giving the prey no chance to escape.

name: scatterbug
flavor_text: The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature, so it can live in any region or climate.

name: spewpa
flavor_text: The beaks of bird Pokémon can’t begin to scratch its stalwart body. To defend itself, it spews powder.

name: vivillon
flavor_text: The patterns on this Pokémon’s wings depend on the climate and topography of its habitat. It scatters colorful scales.

name: litleo
flavor_text: This hot-blooded Pokémon is filled with curiosity. When it gets angry or starts fighting, its short mane gets hot.

name: pyroar-male
flavor_text: The females of a pride work together to bring down prey. It’s thanks to them that their pride doesn’t starve.

pyroar-mega.flavor_text: This Pokémon spews flames hotter than . It swings around its grand, blazing mane as it protects its allies.

name: flabebe
flavor_text: Flabébé wears a crown made from pollen it’s collected from its flower. The crown has hidden healing properties.

name: floette
flavor_text: It gives its own power to flowers, pouring its heart into caring for them. Floette never forgives anyone who messes up a flower bed.

floette-mega.flavor_text: The Eternal Flower has absorbed all the energy from Mega Evolution. The flower now attacks enemies on its own.

name: florges
flavor_text: Its life can span several hundred years. It’s said to devote its entire life to protecting gardens.

name: skiddo
flavor_text: If it has sunshine and water, it doesn’t need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.

name: gogoat
flavor_text: They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.

name: pancham
flavor_text: Wanting to make sure it’s taken seriously, Pancham’s always giving others a glare. But if it’s not focusing, it ends up smiling.

name: pangoro
flavor_text: Using its leaf, Pangoro can predict the moves of its opponents. It strikes with punches that can turn a dump truck into scrap with just one hit.

name: furfrou
flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: espurr
flavor_text: There’s enough psychic power in Espurr to send a wrestler flying, but because this power can’t be controlled, Espurr finds it troublesome.

name: meowstic-male
flavor_text: The eyeball patterns on the interior of its ears emit psychic energy. It keeps the patterns tightly covered because that power is too immense.

meowstic-mega.flavor_text: Mega Meowstic can use its psychic power to compress or expand anything. It overwhelms foes by contorting space itself.

meowstic-female.flavor_text: Female Meowstic are more aggressive than males. Their expression remains blank even while they're wielding immense psychic power.

name: honedge
flavor_text: The blue eye on the sword’s handguard is the true body of Honedge. With its old cloth, it drains people’s lives away.

name: doublade
flavor_text: The two swords employ a strategy of rapidly alternating between offense and defense to bring down their prey.

name: aegislash-shield
flavor_text: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

aegislash-blade.flavor_text: This stance is dedicated to offense. It can cleave any opponent with the strength and weight of its steel blade.

name: spritzee
flavor_text: The scent its body gives off enraptures those who smell it. Noble ladies had no shortage of love for Spritzee.

name: aromatisse
flavor_text: The scents Aromatisse can produce range from sweet smells that bolster allies to foul smells that sap an opponent’s will to fight.

name: swirlix
flavor_text: The sweet smell of cotton candy perfumes Swirlix’s fluffy fur. This Pokémon spits out sticky string to tangle up its enemies.

name: slurpuff
flavor_text: Slurpuff’s fur contains a lot of air, making it soft to the touch and lighter than it looks.

name: inkay
flavor_text: By exposing foes to the blinking of its luminescent spots, Inkay demoralizes them, and then it seizes the chance to flee.

name: malamar
flavor_text: Its hypnotic powers are dangerously strong. Anyone who falls under Malamar’s control loses their memories surrounding the event.

malamar-mega.flavor_text: It uses its colorful lights to overwrite the personalities and memories of others—and to control them.

name: binacle
flavor_text: If the two don’t work well together, both their offense and defense fall apart. Without good teamwork, they won’t survive.

name: barbaracle
flavor_text: Seven Binacle come together to form one Barbaracle. The Binacle that serves as the head gives orders to those serving as the limbs.

barbaracle-mega.flavor_text: It uses its many arms to toy with its opponents. This keeps the head extremely busy.

name: skrelp
flavor_text: Skrelp looks like a piece of rotten seaweed, so it can blend in with seaweed drifting on the ocean and avoid being detected by enemies.

name: dragalge
flavor_text: Using a liquid poison, Dragalge indiscriminately attacks anything that wanders into its territory. This poison can corrode the undersides of boats.

dragalge-mega.flavor_text: It spits a liquid that causes the regenerative power of cells to run wild. The liquid is deadly poison to everything other than itself.

name: clauncher
flavor_text: By detonating gas that accumulates in its right claw, this Pokémon launches water like a bullet. This is how Clauncher defeats its enemies.

name: clawitzer
flavor_text: Clawitzer’s right arm is a cannon that launches projectiles made of seawater. Shots from a Clawitzer’s cannon arm can sink a tanker.

name: helioptile
flavor_text: The sun powers this Pokémon’s electricity generation. Interruption of that process stresses Helioptile to the point of weakness.

name: heliolisk
flavor_text: One Heliolisk basking in the sun with its frill outspread is all it would take to produce enough electricity to power a city.

name: tyrunt
flavor_text: This Pokémon is selfish and likes to be pampered. It can also inflict grievous wounds on its Trainer just by playing around.

name: tyrantrum
flavor_text: A single bite of Tyrantrum’s massive jaws will demolish a car. This Pokémon was the king of the ancient world.

name: amaura
flavor_text: Amaura is an ancient Pokémon that has gone extinct. Specimens of this species can sometimes be found frozen in ice.

name: aurorus
flavor_text: When gripped by rage, Aurorus will emanate freezing air, covering everything around it in ice.

name: sylveon
flavor_text: It emits a soothing aura from its ribbon-shaped organs. It wraps these appendages around quarrelers to instantly restore calm to the situation.

name: hawlucha
flavor_text: Its elegant finishing moves—performed by nimbly leaping around using its wings—are polished in the forest where it was born and raised.

hawlucha-mega.flavor_text: Mega Evolution has pumped up all its muscles. Hawlucha flexes to show off its strength.

name: dedenne
flavor_text: Since Dedenne can’t generate much electricity on its own, it steals electricity from outlets or other electric Pokémon.

name: carbink
flavor_text: It’s said that somewhere in the world, there’s a mineral vein housing a large pack of slumbering Carbink. It’s also said that this pack has a queen.

name: goomy
flavor_text: Goomy hides away in the shade of trees, where it's nice and humid. If the slime coating its body dries out, the Pokémon instantly becomes lethargic.

name: sliggoo
flavor_text: The swirly protrusion on its back is filled with all its vital organs, such as its brain and heart.

sliggoo-hisui.flavor_text: A creature given to melancholy. I suspect its metallic shell developed as a result of the mucus on its skin reacting with the iron in Hisui's water.

name: goodra
flavor_text: It loves the rain. This mellow Pokémon can be seen walking around on the plains and in the mountains on rainy days.

goodra-hisui.flavor_text: Able to freely control the hardness of its metallic shell. It loathes solitude and is extremely clingy—it will fume and run riot if those dearest to it ever leave its side.

name: klefki
flavor_text: Klefki sucks in metal ions with the horn topping its head. It seems this Pokémon loves keys so much that its head needed to look like one, too.

name: phantump
flavor_text: With a voice like a human child’s, it cries out to lure adults deep into the forest, getting them lost among the trees.

name: trevenant
flavor_text: Small roots that extend from the tips of this Pokémon’s feet can tie into the trees of the forest and give Trevenant control over them.

name: pumpkaboo-average
flavor_text: It is said to carry wandering spirits to the place where they belong so they can move on.

pumpkaboo-small.flavor_text: When taking spirits to the afterlife, small Pumpkaboo prefer the spirits of children to those of adults.

pumpkaboo-large.flavor_text: When taking spirits to the afterlife, large Pumpkaboo prefer the spirits of adults to those of children.

pumpkaboo-super.flavor_text: Supersized Pumpkaboo are very partial to the spirits of people who were of similarly superior proportions.

name: gourgeist-average
flavor_text: It enwraps its prey in its hairlike arms. It sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of its prey.

gourgeist-small.flavor_text: Small Gourgeist pretend to be children to fool adults. Anyone who falls for the act gets carried away to the hereafter.

gourgeist-large.flavor_text: Large Gourgeist put on the guise of adults, taking the hands of children to lead them to the afterlife.

gourgeist-super.flavor_text: Supersized Gourgeist aren't picky. They will forcefully drag anyone off to the afterlife.

name: bergmite
flavor_text: Lives on mountains blanketed in perennial snow. It freezes water vapor in the air to make the ice helmet that it dons for defense.

name: avalugg
flavor_text: As Avalugg walks along with Bergmite on its back, it comes across pods of Cetitan. It lets them pass to avoid conflict.

avalugg-hisui.flavor_text: The armor of ice covering its lower jaw puts steel to shame and can shatter rocks with ease. This Pokémon barrels along steep mountain paths, cleaving through the deep snow.

name: noibat
flavor_text: No wavelength of sound is beyond Noibat’s ability to produce. The ultrasonic waves it generates can overcome much larger Pokémon.

name: noivern
flavor_text: Flying through the darkness, it weakens enemies with ultrasonic waves that could crush stone. Its fangs finish the fight.

name: xerneas
flavor_text: When the horns on its head shine in seven colors, it is said to be sharing everlasting life.

name: yveltal
flavor_text: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

name: zygarde-50
flavor_text: It's hypothesized that it's monitoring those who destroy the ecosystem from deep in the cave where it lives.

zygarde-mega.flavor_text: In response to people's emotions during an unprecedented crisis, Zygarde Mega Evolves and calms the situation with its unmatched power.

zygarde-complete.flavor_text: Born when all of Zygarde's cells have been gathered together, it uses force to neutralize those who harm the ecosystem.

zygarde-10.flavor_text: This is Zygarde when about 10% of its pieces have been assembled. It leaps at its opponent's chest and sinks its sharp fangs into them.

name: diancie
flavor_text: Diancie is a spontaneous mutation of Carbink. Its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

diancie-mega.flavor_text: This Pokémon is also known as the Royal Pink Princess. The dazzling, sparkling diamond on its forehead is a whopping 2,000 carats.

name: hoopa
flavor_text: It is said to be able to seize anything it desires with its six rings and six huge arms. With its power sealed, it is transformed into a much smaller form.

hoopa-unbound.flavor_text: This is Hoopa's true form, in which it has regained its sealed powers. The hole in its chest is said to connect to another dimension.

name: volcanion
flavor_text: It expels its internal steam from the arms on its back. It has enough power to blow away a mountain.

name: rowlet
flavor_text: Flies noiselessly on delicate wings. It has mastered the art of deftly launching dagger-sharp feathers from those same wings.

name: dartrix
flavor_text: Regularly basks in sunlight to gather power—presumably due to the frigid climate. Nonetheless, the edges of the blade quills set into its wings are keen as ever.

name: decidueye
flavor_text: It cunningly conceals arrow quills in its wings. It launches these quills with such precision that they can pierce a pebble at over a hundred yards.

decidueye-hisui.flavor_text: The air stored inside the rachises of Decidueye's feathers insulates the Pokémon against Hisui's extreme cold. This is firm proof that evolution can be influenced by environment.

name: litten
flavor_text: Trying to pet Litten before it trusts you will result in a nasty scratch from its sharp claws. Be careful.

name: torracat
flavor_text: When facing a powerful enemy, Torracat’s fighting spirit gets pumped up, and its fire bell blazes hotter.

name: incineroar
flavor_text: Incineroar’s rough and aggressive behavior is its most notable trait, but the way it helps out small Pokémon shows that it has a kind side as well.

name: popplio
flavor_text: If Popplio want to create big, powerful balloons, they must be persistent. It takes daily practice for these Pokémon to develop their skills.

name: brionne
flavor_text: On nights when the sea is calm, Brionne dance with one another to the singing of the Primarina that’s leading them.

name: primarina
flavor_text: For Primarina, every battle’s a stage. Its singing and the dancing of its balloons will mesmerize the audience.

name: pikipek
flavor_text: It may look spindly, but its neck muscles are heavy-duty. It can peck at a tree 16 times per second!

name: trumbeak
flavor_text: From its mouth, it fires the seeds of berries it has eaten. The scattered seeds give rise to new plants.

name: toucannon
flavor_text: Known for forming harmonious couples, this Pokémon is brought to wedding ceremonies as a good luck charm.

name: yungoos
flavor_text: Although it will eat anything, it prefers fresh living things, so it marches down streets in search of prey.

name: gumshoos
flavor_text: Patient by nature, this Pokémon loses control of itself and pounces when it spots its favorite meal—Rattata!

name: grubbin
flavor_text: It uses its big jaws to dig nests into the forest floor, and it loves to feed on sweet tree sap.

name: charjabug
flavor_text: Its digestive processes convert the leaves it eats into electricity. An electric sac in its belly stores the electricity for later use.

name: vikavolt
flavor_text: If it carries a Charjabug to use as a spare battery, a flying Vikavolt can rapidly fire high-powered beams of electricity.

name: crabrawler
flavor_text: Crabrawler has been known to mistake Exeggutor for a coconut tree and climb it. The enraged Exeggutor shakes it off and stomps it.

name: crabominable
flavor_text: The detached pincers of these Pokémon are delicious. Some Trainers bring Lechonk into the mountains just to search for them.

crabominable-mega.flavor_text: It can pulverize reinforced concrete with a light swing of one of its fists, each of which is covered in a thick layer of ice.

name: oricorio-baile
flavor_text: This Oricorio has drunk red nectar. If its Trainer gives the wrong order, this passionate Pokémon becomes fiercely angry.

oricorio-pom-pom.flavor_text: This form of Oricorio has sipped yellow nectar. It uses nimble steps to approach opponents, then knocks them out with electric punches.

oricorio-pau.flavor_text: The airy dance of these Oricorio is popular as a means of maintaining good health, but the Oricorio themselves are hard to find in Paldea.

oricorio-sensu.flavor_text: This form of Oricorio has sipped purple nectar. It uses ethereal dance steps to call forth the spirits of the dead.

name: cutiefly
flavor_text: An opponent’s aura can tell Cutiefly what that opponent’s next move will be. Then Cutiefly can glide around the attack and strike back.

name: ribombee
flavor_text: Ribombee absolutely hate getting wet or rained on. In the cloudy Galar region, they are very seldom seen.

name: rockruff
flavor_text: This Pokémon intimidates opponents by striking the ground with the rocks on its neck. The moment an opponent flinches, Rockruff attacks.

name: lycanroc-midday
flavor_text: With swift movements, this Pokémon gradually backs its prey into a corner. Lycanroc’s fangs are always aimed toward opponents’ weak spots.

lycanroc-midnight.flavor_text: This Pokémon uses its rocky mane to slash any who approach. It will even disobey its Trainer if it dislikes the orders it was given.

lycanroc-dusk.flavor_text: Normally this Pokémon doesn't even bark, but once it enters battle, it will relentlessly drive the opponent into a corner.

name: wishiwashi-solo
flavor_text: When it senses danger, its eyes tear up. The sparkle of its tears signals other Wishiwashi to gather.

wishiwashi-school.flavor_text: On their own, they're very weak. But when Wishiwashi pool their power together in a school, they become a demon of the sea.

name: mareanie
flavor_text: Unlike their Alolan counterparts, the Mareanie of the Galar region have not yet figured out that the branches of Corsola are delicious.

name: toxapex
flavor_text: Within the poison sac in its body is a poison so toxic that Pokémon as large as Wailord will still be suffering three days after it first takes effect.

name: mudbray
flavor_text: It eats dirt to create mud and smears this mud all over its feet, giving them the grip needed to walk on rough terrain without slipping.

name: mudsdale
flavor_text: Mudsdale has so much stamina that it could carry over 10 tons across the Galar region without rest or sleep.

name: dewpider
flavor_text: Dewpider normally lives underwater. When it comes onto land in search of food, it takes water with it in the form of a bubble on its head.

name: araquanid
flavor_text: It acts as a caretaker for Dewpider, putting them inside its bubble and letting them eat any leftover food.

name: fomantis
flavor_text: During the day, Fomantis basks in sunlight and sleeps peacefully. It wakes and moves around at night.

name: lurantis
flavor_text: The petals on this Pokémon’s arms are thin and super sharp, and they can fire laser beams if Lurantis gathers light first.

name: morelull
flavor_text: Morelull live in forests that stay dark even during the day. They scatter flickering spores that put enemies to sleep.

name: shiinotic
flavor_text: If you see a light deep in a forest at night, don’t go near. Shiinotic will make you fall fast asleep.

name: salandit
flavor_text: This sneaky Pokémon will slink behind its prey and immobilize it with poisonous gas before the prey even realizes Salandit is there.

name: salazzle
flavor_text: The winner of competitions between Salazzle is decided by which one has the most male Salandit with it.

name: stufful
flavor_text: The way it protects itself by flailing its arms may be an adorable sight, but stay well away. This is flailing that can snap thick tree trunks.

name: bewear
flavor_text: The moves it uses to take down its prey would make a martial artist jealous. It tucks subdued prey under its arms to carry them to its nest.

name: bounsweet
flavor_text: When under attack, it secretes a sweet and delicious sweat. The scent only calls more enemies to it.

name: steenee
flavor_text: Any Corvisquire that pecks at this Pokémon will be greeted with a smack from its sepals followed by a sharp kick.

name: tsareena
flavor_text: A kick from the hardened tips of this Pokémon’s legs leaves a wound in the opponent’s body and soul that will never heal.

name: comfey
flavor_text: These Pokémon smell very nice. All Comfey wear different flowers, so each of these Pokémon has its own individual scent.

name: oranguru
flavor_text: It knows the forest inside and out. If it comes across a wounded Pokémon, Oranguru will gather medicinal herbs to treat it.

name: passimian
flavor_text: Passimian live in groups of about 20, with each member performing an assigned role. Through cooperation, the group survives.

name: wimpod
flavor_text: Wimpod gather in swarms, constantly on the lookout for danger. They scatter the moment they detect an enemy’s presence.

name: golisopod
flavor_text: It will do anything to win, taking advantage of every opening and finishing opponents off with the small claws on its front legs.

golisopod-mega.flavor_text: It uses four of its arms to fiercely assail its foes. Once they've been pushed to the brink of defeat, it finishes them off with the arms it kept hidden.

name: sandygast
flavor_text: Sandygast mainly inhabits beaches. It takes control of anyone who puts their hand into its mouth, forcing them to make its body bigger.

name: palossand
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives on beaches, but it hates water. Palossand can’t maintain its castle-like shape if it gets drenched by a heavy rain.

name: pyukumuku
flavor_text: It lives in warm, shallow waters. If it encounters a foe, it will spit out its internal organs as a means to punch them.

name: type-null
flavor_text: It was modeled after a mighty Pokémon of myth. The mask placed upon it limits its power in order to keep it under control.

name: silvally
flavor_text: The final factor needed to release this Pokémon’s true power was a strong bond with a Trainer it trusts.

name: minior-red-meteor
flavor_text: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

minior-orange-meteor.flavor_text: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

minior-yellow-meteor.flavor_text: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

minior-green-meteor.flavor_text: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

minior-blue-meteor.flavor_text: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

minior-indigo-meteor.flavor_text: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

minior-violet-meteor.flavor_text: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

minior-red.flavor_text: Minior that fall to the ground try to return to space, but their wish will not come true—all they can do is fade away.

minior-orange.flavor_text: Minior that fall to the ground try to return to space, but their wish will not come true—all they can do is fade away.

minior-yellow.flavor_text: Minior that fall to the ground try to return to space, but their wish will not come true—all they can do is fade away.

minior-green.flavor_text: Minior that fall to the ground try to return to space, but their wish will not come true—all they can do is fade away.

minior-blue.flavor_text: Minior that fall to the ground try to return to space, but their wish will not come true—all they can do is fade away.

minior-indigo.flavor_text: Minior that fall to the ground try to return to space, but their wish will not come true—all they can do is fade away.

minior-violet.flavor_text: Minior that fall to the ground try to return to space, but their wish will not come true—all they can do is fade away.

name: komala
flavor_text: It remains asleep from birth to death as a result of the sedative properties of the leaves that form its diet.

name: turtonator
flavor_text: Eating sulfur in its volcanic habitat is what causes explosive compounds to develop in its shell. Its droppings are also dangerously explosive.

name: togedemaru
flavor_text: When it’s in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.

name: mimikyu-disguised
flavor_text: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

mimikyu-busted.flavor_text: Even as it struggles beneath the cloth to repair the broken neck of its disguise, Mimikyu keeps up its impersonation of Pikachu.

name: bruxish
flavor_text: Its skin is thick enough to fend off Mareanie’s spikes. With its robust teeth, Bruxish crunches up the spikes and eats them.

name: drampa
flavor_text: The mountains it calls home are nearly two miles in height. On rare occasions, it descends to play with the children living in the towns below.

drampa-mega.flavor_text: Drampa's cells have been invigorated, allowing it to regain its youth. It manipulates the atmosphere to summon storms.

name: dhelmise
flavor_text: After lowering its anchor, it waits for its prey. It catches large Wailord and drains their life-force.

name: jangmo-o
flavor_text: Jangmo-o strikes its scales to communicate with others of its kind. Its scales are actually fur that’s become as hard as metal.

name: hakamo-o
flavor_text: Before attacking its enemies, it clashes its scales together and roars. Its sharp claws shred the opposition.

name: kommo-o
flavor_text: Certain ruins have paintings of ancient warriors wearing armor made of Kommo-o scales.

name: tapu-koko
flavor_text: The lightning-wielding guardian deity of Melemele, Tapu Koko is brimming with curiosity and appears before people from time to time.

name: tapu-lele
flavor_text: Although called a guardian deity, Tapu Lele is devoid of guilt about its cruel disposition and can be described as nature incarnate.

name: tapu-bulu
flavor_text: It makes ringing sounds with its tail to let others know where it is, avoiding unneeded conflicts. This guardian deity of Ula’ula controls plants.

name: tapu-fini
flavor_text: Although it’s called a guardian deity, terrible calamities sometimes befall those who recklessly approach Tapu Fini.

name: cosmog
flavor_text: Cosmog is very curious but not very cautious, often placing itself in danger. If things start to look dicey, it teleports away.

name: cosmoem
flavor_text: It sucks in dust from the air at an astounding rate, frantically building up energy within its core as preparation for evolution.

name: solgaleo
flavor_text: Solgaleo was once known as the Beast That Devours the Sun. Energy in the form of light radiates boundlessly from it.

name: lunala
