flavor_text: It steals the light from its surroundings and then becomes the full moon, showering its own light across the night sky.

name: nihilego
flavor_text: It appeared in this world from an Ultra Wormhole. Nihilego appears to be a parasite that lives by feeding on people and Pokémon.

name: buzzwole
flavor_text: Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast.

name: pheromosa
flavor_text: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

name: xurkitree
flavor_text: They’ve been dubbed Ultra Beasts. Some of them stand unmoving, like trees, with their arms and legs stuck into the ground.

name: celesteela
flavor_text: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

name: kartana
flavor_text: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

name: guzzlord
flavor_text: An unknown life-form called a UB. It may be constantly hungry—it is certainly always devouring something.

name: necrozma
flavor_text: It survives by absorbing light. After a long time spent slumbering underground, impurities accumulated within it, causing its body to darken.

necrozma-dusk.flavor_text: When it dominates Solgaleo, it takes on this form. It's a vicious Pokémon, mangling prey with its many claws—including those on its back.

necrozma-dawn.flavor_text: Necrozma has subjugated Lunala entirely, forcing the unfortunate to emit its light energy for Necrozma to consume.

necrozma-ultra.flavor_text: The light pouring out from all over its body affects living things and nature, impacting them in various ways.

name: magearna
flavor_text: This Pokémon was built by a scientist roughly 500 years ago. The part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

magearna-mega.flavor_text: This is Magearna once a previously hidden mode activates. The emotions Magearna had begun to feel now hide away as it fells foe after foe.

magearna-original-mega.flavor_text: A mechanism to remove Magearna's limitations has lain secretly within Magearna for 500 years. This mechanism is triggered by a Mega Stone.

magearna-original.flavor_text: This Magearna looks as it did at the time of its invention. Its magnificent ornamentation delighted the king's daughter.

name: marshadow
flavor_text: This Pokémon can conceal itself in any shadow, so it went undiscovered for a long time.

name: poipole
flavor_text: An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head.

name: naganadel
flavor_text: One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive.

name: stakataka
flavor_text: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.

name: blacephalon
flavor_text: A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.

name: zeraora
flavor_text: It runs as fast as lightning strikes, shredding its opponents with its high-voltage claws.

zeraora-mega.flavor_text: It stores up 10 lightning strikes' worth of electricity. When it stops limiting itself, it's in the strongest class of electric Pokémon.

name: meltan
flavor_text: They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve.

name: melmetal
flavor_text: At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan.

melmetal-gmax.flavor_text: In a distant land, there are legends about a cyclopean giant. In fact, the giant was a Melmetal that was flooded with Gigantamax energy.

name: grookey
flavor_text: It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped.

name: thwackey
flavor_text: When it’s drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won’t even notice that it’s already knocked out its opponent.

name: rillaboom
flavor_text: Though it has a calm disposition, it won’t tolerate those who drum up discord. It strictly disciplines offenders until they learn their lesson.

rillaboom-gmax.flavor_text: Gigantamax energy has caused Rillaboom's stump to grow into a drum set that resembles a forest.

name: scorbunny
flavor_text: It has special pads on the backs of its feet, and one on its nose. Once it’s raring to fight, these pads radiate tremendous heat.

name: raboot
flavor_text: It kicks berries right off the branches of trees and then juggles them with its feet, practicing its footwork.

name: cinderace
flavor_text: Although Cinderace loses its cool easily, it will battle flawlessly for a Trainer it trusts.

cinderace-gmax.flavor_text: Infused with Cinderace's fighting spirit, the never misses its targets and completely roasts opponents.

name: sobble
flavor_text: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.

name: drizzile
flavor_text: Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it keeps enemies out of its territory by laying traps everywhere.

name: inteleon
flavor_text: It uses special lenses in its eyes to sense things about its opponents—like their body heat—then attacks once it identifies a weak spot.

inteleon-gmax.flavor_text: Gigantamax Inteleon's Water Gun move fires at Mach 7. As the Pokémon takes aim, it uses the crest on its head to gauge wind and temperature.

name: skwovet
flavor_text: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It’ll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.

name: greedent
flavor_text: Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.

name: rookidee
flavor_text: Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.

name: corvisquire
flavor_text: The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength.

name: corviknight
flavor_text: Corviknight can’t serve as a taxi service in Paldea because the Pokémon’s Tinkatons will attack it while it flies, endangering the customer.

corviknight-gmax.flavor_text: Imbued with Gigantamax energy, its wings can whip up winds more forceful than any a hurricane could muster. The gusts blow everything away.

name: blipbug
flavor_text: Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings.

name: dottler
flavor_text: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor the outside world and prepare for evolution.

name: orbeetle
flavor_text: It's famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.

orbeetle-gmax.flavor_text: Its brain has grown to a gargantuan size, as has the rest of its body. This Pokémon's intellect and psychic abilities are overpowering.

name: nickit
flavor_text: Cunning and cautious, this Pokémon survives by stealing food from others. It erases its tracks with swipes of its tail as it makes off with its plunder.

name: thievul
flavor_text: With a lithe body and sharp claws, it goes around stealing food and eggs. Boltund is its natural enemy.

name: gossifleur
flavor_text: It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.

name: eldegoss
flavor_text: The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.

name: wooloo
flavor_text: If its fleece grows too long, Wooloo won’t be able to move. Cloth made with the wool of this Pokémon is surprisingly strong.

name: dubwool
flavor_text: Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.

name: chewtle
flavor_text: It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.

name: drednaw
flavor_text: Its massive, jagged teeth can crush a boulder in a single bite. This Pokémon has an extremely vicious disposition.

drednaw-gmax.flavor_text: It responded to Gigantamax energy by becoming bipedal. First it comes crashing down on foes, and then it finishes them off with its massive jaws.

name: yamper
flavor_text: This gluttonous Pokémon only assists people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity.

name: boltund
flavor_text: It sends electricity through its legs to boost their strength. Running at top speed, it easily breaks 50 mph.

name: rolycoly
flavor_text: It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.

name: carkol
flavor_text: By rapidly rolling its legs, it can travel at over 18 mph. The temperature of the flames it breathes exceeds 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: coalossal
flavor_text: To intimidate its opponents, Coalossal will vigorously shake its body, scattering coal from its smoldering back.

coalossal-gmax.flavor_text: Its body is a colossal stove. With Gigantamax energy stoking the fire, this Pokémon's flame burns hotter than .

name: applin
flavor_text: As soon as it’s born, it burrows into an apple. Not only does the apple serve as its food source, but the flavor of the fruit determines its evolution.

name: flapple
flavor_text: It flutters around while seeking an opening in the opponent’s guard, then attacks by spitting acidic liquid strong enough to melt metal.

flapple-gmax.flavor_text: Under the influence of Gigantamax energy, it produces much more sweet nectar, and its shape has changed to resemble a giant apple.

name: appletun
flavor_text: It feeds mainly on sweet apples. It will also eat small bug Pokémon that are attracted by its sweet nectar.

appletun-gmax.flavor_text: It blasts its opponents with massive amounts of sweet, sticky nectar, drowning them under the deluge.

name: silicobra
flavor_text: It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide.

name: sandaconda
flavor_text: It will expand its body as much as it can and then contract itself, blasting out sand with enough force to wash away a dump truck.

sandaconda-gmax.flavor_text: Its sand pouch has grown to tremendous proportions. More than 1,000,000 tons of sand now swirl around its body.

name: cramorant
flavor_text: Cramorant instinctively swallow everything whole. They're at their most formidable when they're struggling to swallow overly large prey.

cramorant-gulping.flavor_text: Cramorant is constantly on the hunt for food along riverbanks. It loves Arrokuda—when it finds them, it swallows them whole without a thought.

cramorant-gorging.flavor_text: Its throat is clearly not wide enough to swallow a Pikachu, and yet Cramorant makes no move to release its catch.

name: arrokuda
flavor_text: After it’s eaten its fill, its movements become extremely sluggish. That’s when Cramorant swallows it up.

name: barraskewda
flavor_text: It spins its tail fins to propel itself, surging forward at speeds of over 100 knots before ramming prey and spearing into them.

name: toxel
flavor_text: It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.

name: toxtricity-amped
flavor_text: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

toxtricity-amped-gmax.flavor_text: Its excessive electric energy is its weapon. This Pokémon can build up more electricity than any thundercloud.

toxtricity-low-key-gmax.flavor_text: Its excessive electric energy is its weapon. This Pokémon can build up more electricity than any thundercloud.

toxtricity-low-key.flavor_text: Many youths admire the way this Pokémon listlessly picks fights and keeps its cool no matter what opponent it faces.

name: sizzlipede
flavor_text: It wraps prey up with its heated body, cooking them in its coils. Once they’re well-done, it will voraciously nibble them down to the last morsel.

name: centiskorch
flavor_text: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about . It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.

centiskorch-gmax.flavor_text: Gigantamax energy has evoked a rise in its body temperature, now reaching over . Its heat waves incinerate its enemies.

name: clobbopus
flavor_text: Its tentacles tear off easily, but it isn’t alarmed when that happens—it knows they’ll grow back. It’s about as smart as a three-year-old.

name: grapploct
flavor_text: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.

name: sinistea
flavor_text: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.

name: polteageist
flavor_text: Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist.

name: hatenna
flavor_text: If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.

name: hattrem
flavor_text: Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer.

name: hatterene
flavor_text: Hatterene knocks out those that intrude in its home forest by blasting them with a beam, then slashing with claws enhanced by psychic power.

hatterene-gmax.flavor_text: This Pokémon can read the emotions of creatures over away. The minute it senses hostility, it goes on the attack.

name: impidimp
flavor_text: It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.

name: morgrem
flavor_text: With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.

name: grimmsnarl
flavor_text: This Pokémon has complete control over its hair. Grimmsnarl normally keeps its hair wrapped around its body to support its muscles.

grimmsnarl-gmax.flavor_text: By transforming its leg hair, this Pokémon delivers power-packed drill kicks that can bore huge holes in Galar's terrain.

name: obstagoon
flavor_text: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch.

name: perrserker
flavor_text: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.

name: cursola
flavor_text: Be cautious of the ectoplasmic body surrounding its soul. You’ll become stiff as stone if you touch it.

name: sirfetchd
flavor_text: After deflecting attacks with its hard leaf shield, it strikes back with its sharp leek stalk. The leek stalk is both weapon and food.

name: mr-rime
flavor_text: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.

name: runerigus
flavor_text: Never touch its shadowlike body, or you’ll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it.

name: milcery
flavor_text: They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.

name: alcremie
flavor_text: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.

alcremie-gmax.flavor_text: Cream pours endlessly from this Pokémon's body. The cream stiffens when compressed by an impact. A harder impact results in harder cream.

name: falinks
flavor_text: The brass, which is the one that stands at the front and issues orders, is the strongest and smartest of the six.

falinks-mega.flavor_text: Mega Falinks has taken on the ultimate battle formation, which can be achieved only if the troopers and brass have the strongest of bonds.

name: pincurchin
flavor_text: It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours.

name: snom
flavor_text: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.

name: frosmoth
flavor_text: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.

name: stonjourner
flavor_text: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.

name: eiscue-ice
flavor_text: This Pokémon keeps its heat-sensitive head cool with ice. It fishes for its food, dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey.

eiscue-noice.flavor_text: The ice that was covering this Eiscue’s face has shattered. Eiscue emits cold air from the tip of its hair to protect its head, which is sensitive to heat.

name: indeedee-male
flavor_text: Through its horns, it can pick up on the emotions of creatures around it. Positive emotions are the source of its strength.

indeedee-female.flavor_text: It dislikes conflict. If a fight occurs in its territory, it uses psychic power to throw things at the combatants in an effort to drive them away.

name: morpeko-full-belly
flavor_text: It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order.

morpeko-hangry.flavor_text: Even after using up all its dark energy, this violent ruffian will keep running riot until its hunger is appeased.

name: cufant
flavor_text: If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color.

name: copperajah
flavor_text: This Pokémon was brought to Paldea long ago by people from a faraway land. It’s so strong that it can easily pull an airplane.

copperajah-gmax.flavor_text: So much power is packed within its trunk that if it were to unleash that power, the resulting blast could level mountains and change the landscape.

name: dracozolt
flavor_text: The powerful muscles in its tail generate its electricity. Compared to its lower body, its upper half is entirely too small.

name: arctozolt
flavor_text: This Pokémon lived on prehistoric seashores and was able to preserve food with the ice on its body. It went extinct because it moved so slowly.

name: dracovish
flavor_text: Its mighty legs are capable of running at speeds exceeding 40 mph, but this Pokémon can’t breathe unless it’s underwater.

name: arctovish
flavor_text: The skin on its face is impervious to attack, but breathing difficulties made this Pokémon go extinct anyway.

name: duraludon
flavor_text: Duraludon’s body is comprised of a special metal that’s lightweight and scratch resistant. It’s also smooth, as though it was given a mirror finish.

duraludon-gmax.flavor_text: It's grown to resemble a skyscraper. Parts of its towering body glow due to a profusion of energy.

name: dreepy
flavor_text: If this weak Pokémon is by itself, a mere child could defeat it. But if Dreepy has friends to help it train, it can evolve and become much stronger.

name: drakloak
flavor_text: Without a Dreepy to place on its head and care for, it gets so uneasy it’ll try to substitute any Pokémon it finds for the missing Dreepy.

name: dragapult
flavor_text: Apparently the Dreepy inside Dragapult’s horns eagerly look forward to being launched out at Mach speeds.

name: zacian
flavor_text: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.

zacian-crowned.flavor_text: Now armed with a weapon it used in ancient times, this Pokémon needs only a single strike to fell even Gigantamax Pokémon.

name: zamazenta
flavor_text: This Pokémon slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed.

zamazenta-crowned.flavor_text: Its ability to deflect any attack led to it being known as the Fighting Master's Shield. It was feared and respected by all.

name: eternatus
flavor_text: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.

eternatus-eternamax.flavor_text: As a result of Rose's meddling, Eternatus absorbed all the energy in the Galar region. It's now in a state of power overload.

name: kubfu
flavor_text: If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly.

name: urshifu-single-strike
flavor_text: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

urshifu-single-strike-gmax.flavor_text: People call it the embodiment of rage. It's said that this Pokémon's terrifying expression and shout will rid the world of malevolence.

urshifu-rapid-strike-gmax.flavor_text: As it waits for the right moment to unleash its Gigantamax power, this Pokémon maintains a perfect one-legged stance. It won't even twitch.

urshifu-rapid-strike.flavor_text: It's believed that this Pokémon modeled its fighting style on the flow of a river—sometimes rapid, sometimes calm.

name: zarude
flavor_text: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It's incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.

zarude-dada.flavor_text: This Zarude left its pack to raise . The cloth Zarude would wrap the child with has a comforting scent that calmed the child's crying.

name: regieleki
flavor_text: Its entire body is made up of a single organ that generates electrical energy. Regieleki is capable of creating all Galar’s electricity.

name: regidrago
flavor_text: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon.

name: glastrier
flavor_text: Glastrier has tremendous physical strength, and the mask of ice covering its face is 100 times harder than diamond.

name: spectrier
flavor_text: As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude.

name: calyrex
flavor_text: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

calyrex-ice.flavor_text: According to lore, this Pokémon showed no mercy to those who got in its way, yet it would heal its opponents' wounds after battle.

calyrex-shadow.flavor_text: It's said that Calyrex and a Spectrier that had bonded with it ran all across the Galar region to bring green to the wastelands.

name: wyrdeer
flavor_text: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.

name: kleavor
flavor_text: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.

name: ursaluna
flavor_text: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

ursaluna-bloodmoon.flavor_text: It crossed the sea and drifted ashore in [[Kitakami

name: basculegion-male
flavor_text: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.

basculegion-female.flavor_text: The souls of its comrades cloak its body and propel it effortlessly through even raging rapids.

name: sneasler
flavor_text: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.

name: overqwil
flavor_text: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.

name: enamorus-incarnate
flavor_text: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

enamorus-therian.flavor_text: A different guise from its feminine humanoid form. From the clouds, it descends upon those who treat any form of life with disrespect and metes out wrathful, ruthless punishment.

name: sprigatito
flavor_text: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

name: floragato
flavor_text: The hardness of Floragato’s fur depends on the Pokémon’s mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

name: meowscarada
flavor_text: With skillful misdirection, it rigs foes with pollen-packed flower bombs. Meowscarada sets off the bombs before its foes realize what’s going on.

name: fuecoco
flavor_text: Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco’s head and flickers to and fro.

name: crocalor
flavor_text: The valve in Crocalor’s flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way.

name: skeledirge
flavor_text: Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: quaxly
flavor_text: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things.

name: quaxwell
flavor_text: The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines.

name: quaquaval
flavor_text: Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.

name: lechonk
flavor_text: This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

name: oinkologne-male
flavor_text: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

oinkologne-female.flavor_text: This Pokémon sends a flowerlike scent wafting about. Well-developed muscles in its legs allow it to leap with no trouble at all.

name: tarountula
flavor_text: The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread’s strength is the topic of ongoing research.

name: spidops
flavor_text: Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.

name: nymble
flavor_text: It’s highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.

name: lokix
flavor_text: It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can’t stay in this mode for long.

name: pawmi
flavor_text: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

name: pawmo
flavor_text: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

name: pawmot
flavor_text: Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

name: tandemaus
flavor_text: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

name: maushold-family-of-four
flavor_text: The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

maushold-family-of-three.flavor_text: They build huge nests with many rooms that are used for different purposes, such as eating and sleeping.

name: fidough
flavor_text: The yeast in Fidough’s breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.

name: dachsbun
flavor_text: The surface of this Pokémon’s skin hardens when exposed to intense heat, and its body has an appetizing aroma.

name: smoliv
flavor_text: This Pokémon converts nutrients into oil, which it stores in the fruit on its head. It can easily go a whole week without eating or drinking.

name: dolliv
flavor_text: It basks in the sun to its heart’s content until the fruits on its head ripen. After that, Dolliv departs from human settlements and goes on a journey.

name: arboliva
flavor_text: This Pokémon drives back enemies by launching its rich, aromatic oil at them with enough force to smash a boulder.

name: squawkabilly-green-plumage
flavor_text: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

squawkabilly-blue-plumage.flavor_text: The largest of their flocks can contain more than 50 individuals. They fly around towns and forests, searching for food and making a racket.

squawkabilly-yellow-plumage.flavor_text: These Squawkabilly are hotheaded, and their fighting style is vicious. They’ll leap within reach of their foes to engage in close combat.

squawkabilly-white-plumage.flavor_text: This Pokémon dislikes being alone. It has a strong sense of community and survives by cooperating with allies.

name: nacli
flavor_text: The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli’s body.

name: naclstack
flavor_text: It compresses rock salt inside its body and shoots out hardened salt pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet.

name: garganacl
flavor_text: Many Pokémon gather around Garganacl, hoping to lick at its mineral-rich salt.

name: charcadet
flavor_text: Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat.

name: armarouge
flavor_text: This Pokémon clads itself in armor that has been fortified by psychic and fire energy, and it shoots blazing fireballs.

name: ceruledge
flavor_text: An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon’s evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

name: tadbulb
flavor_text: It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

name: bellibolt
flavor_text: What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs for discharging the electricity generated by Bellibolt’s belly-button dynamo.

name: wattrel
flavor_text: These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they’re a popular delicacy.

name: kilowattrel
flavor_text: It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.

name: maschiff
flavor_text: Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

name: mabosstiff
flavor_text: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

name: shroodle
flavor_text: To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.

name: grafaiai
flavor_text: Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.

name: bramblin
flavor_text: Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

name: brambleghast
flavor_text: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

name: toedscool
flavor_text: Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.

name: toedscruel
flavor_text: It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy.

name: klawf
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.

name: capsakid
flavor_text: Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.

name: scovillain
flavor_text: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

scovillain-mega.flavor_text: Mega Evolution has dialed up this Pokémon's spiciness. It swings its 'necktie' around to wallop its foes.

name: rellor
flavor_text: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

name: rabsca
flavor_text: An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.

name: flittle
flavor_text: It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge.

name: espathra
flavor_text: It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.

name: tinkatink
flavor_text: This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.

name: tinkatuff
flavor_text: These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.

name: tinkaton
flavor_text: The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.

name: wiglett
flavor_text: Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.

name: wugtrio
flavor_text: A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.

name: bombirdier
flavor_text: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

name: finizen
flavor_text: Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole.

name: palafin-zero
flavor_text: Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.

palafin-hero.flavor_text: This Pokémon's ancient genes have awakened. It is now so extraordinarily strong that it can easily lift a cruise ship with one fin.

name: varoom
flavor_text: The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

name: revavroom
flavor_text: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

name: cyclizar
flavor_text: It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit.

name: orthworm
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

name: glimmet
flavor_text: Glimmet’s toxic mineral crystals look just like flower petals. This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder like pollen to protect itself.

name: glimmora
flavor_text: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.

glimmora-mega.flavor_text: Glimmora's petals—now larger and separated from its main body—rotate around it to provide defense while scattering poisonous fragments.

name: greavard
flavor_text: This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

name: houndstone
flavor_text: A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.

name: flamigo
flavor_text: Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.

name: cetoddle
flavor_text: It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice.

name: cetitan
flavor_text: Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.

name: veluza
flavor_text: Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.

name: dondozo
flavor_text: It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.

name: tatsugiri-curly
flavor_text: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

tatsugiri-curly-mega.flavor_text: Tatsugiri's brain has been invigorated by Mega Evolution, making it even wilier. It can create and command copies of itself.

tatsugiri-droopy-mega.flavor_text: It solidifies the energy of Mega Evolution, building up an overflowing pile to launch as projectiles. These projectiles explode on contact.

tatsugiri-stretchy-mega.flavor_text: Using the energy of Mega Evolution, it creates a dish to ride upon, allowing it to move with total freedom-even through the air.

tatsugiri-droopy.flavor_text: This species' differing colors and patterns are apparently the result of Tatsugiri changing itself to suit the preferences of the prey it lures in.

tatsugiri-stretchy.flavor_text: Bird Pokémon are its main prey. This Pokémon knows it's weak, so it hunts with a partner.

name: annihilape
flavor_text: It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.

name: clodsire
flavor_text: It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other.

name: farigiraf
flavor_text: The hardened head from the tail protects the head of the main body as Farigiraf whips its long neck around to headbutt enemies.

name: dudunsparce-two-segment
flavor_text: It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast.

dudunsparce-three-segment.flavor_text: The gentle Dudunsparce will put Pokémon that wander into its nest onto its back and carry them to the entrance.

name: kingambit
flavor_text: Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing.

name: great-tusk
flavor_text: This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times.

name: scream-tail
flavor_text: It resembles a mysterious Pokémon described in a paranormal magazine as a Jigglypuff from one billion years ago.

name: brute-bonnet
flavor_text: It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.

name: flutter-mane
flavor_text: It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.

name: slither-wing
flavor_text: This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.

name: sandy-shocks
flavor_text: It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine.

name: iron-treads
flavor_text: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. It resembles a mysterious object described in an old expedition journal.

name: iron-bundle
flavor_text: It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon.

name: iron-hands
flavor_text: This Pokémon shares many similarities with Iron Hands, an object mentioned in a certain expedition journal.

name: iron-jugulis
flavor_text: It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.

name: iron-moth
flavor_text: No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book.

name: iron-thorns
flavor_text: Some of its notable features match those of an object named within a certain expedition journal as Iron Thorns.

name: frigibax
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.

name: arctibax
flavor_text: It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.

name: baxcalibur
flavor_text: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

baxcalibur-mega.flavor_text: Baxcalibur's dorsal blade has grown even more massive thanks to Mega Evolution. This Pokémon fires beams from the hilt at its solar plexus.

name: gimmighoul
flavor_text: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

gimmighoul-roaming.flavor_text: This Pokémon was born from passion that seeped into a coin. It wanders, apparently seeking to return to the treasure chest it once inhabited.

name: gholdengo
flavor_text: It has a sturdy body made up of stacked coins. Gholdengo overwhelms its enemies by firing coin after coin at them in quick succession.

name: wo-chien
flavor_text: It drains the life-force from vegetation, causing nearby forests to instantly wither and fields to turn barren.

name: chien-pao
flavor_text: The hatred of those who perished by the sword long ago has clad itself in snow and become a Pokémon.

name: ting-lu
flavor_text: It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.

name: chi-yu
flavor_text: The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.

name: roaring-moon
flavor_text: According to an article in a dubious magazine, this Pokémon has some connection to a phenomenon that occurs in a certain region.

name: iron-valiant
flavor_text: It’s possible that this is the object listed as Iron Valiant in a certain expedition journal.

name: koraidon
flavor_text: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: miraidon
flavor_text: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: walking-wake
flavor_text: It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.

name: iron-leaves
flavor_text: According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.

name: dipplin
flavor_text: The head sticking out belongs to the fore-wyrm, while the tail belongs to the core-wyrm. The two share one apple and help each other out.

name: poltchageist
flavor_text: Poltchageist looks like a regional form of Sinistea, but it was recently discovered that the two Pokémon are entirely unrelated.

name: sinistcha
flavor_text: It prefers cool, dark places, such as the back of a shelf or the space beneath a home's floorboards. It wanders in search of prey after sunset.

name: okidogi
flavor_text: Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.

name: munkidori
flavor_text: Munkidori keeps itself somewhere safe while it toys with its foes, using psychokinesis to induce intense dizziness.

name: fezandipiti
flavor_text: Fezandipiti beats its glossy wings to scatter pheromones that captivate people and Pokémon.

name: ogerpon
flavor_text: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

ogerpon-wellspring-mask.flavor_text: This form excels in both attack and defense. It ceaselessly unleashes moves like a spring gushes water.

ogerpon-hearthflame-mask.flavor_text: This form is the most aggressive, bombarding enemies with the intensity of flames blazing within a hearth.

ogerpon-cornerstone-mask.flavor_text: This form has excellent defenses, absorbing impacts solidly like the cornerstones that support houses.

name: archaludon
flavor_text: It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It’s so durable that being caught in a cave-in won’t faze it.

name: hydrapple
flavor_text: These capricious syrpents have banded together. On the rare occasion that their moods align, their true power is unleashed.

name: gouging-fire
flavor_text: It resembles an eerie Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.

name: raging-bolt
flavor_text: It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.

name: iron-boulder
flavor_text: It was named after a mysterious object recorded in an old book. Its body seems to be metallic.

name: iron-crown
flavor_text: There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.

name: terapagos
flavor_text: It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

terapagos-terastal.flavor_text: Upon sensing danger, it prepares itself for battle by creating a sturdy shell of crystallized Terastal energy.

terapagos-stellar.flavor_text: In this form, Terapagos resembles the world as the ancients saw it, and its Terastal energy is abnormally amplified.

name: pecharunt
flavor_text: Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves them to people and Pokémon.
